channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-1712] mmp test_8: @@@@@@ FAIL: mount /dev/lvm-MDS/P1 on mds1 should fail
item.description:
https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_logs/4ee0d9ec-dde4-11e1-85a8-52540035b04c

== mmp test 8: mount during e2fsck =================================================================== 19:50:25 (1344048625)
Running e2fsck on the device /dev/lvm-MDS/P1 on mds1...
Mounting /dev/lvm-MDS/P1 on mds1...
CMD: client-14vm3 mkdir -p /mnt/mds1
CMD: client-14vm3 test -b /dev/lvm-MDS/P1
Starting mds1: -o user_xattr,acl /dev/lvm-MDS/P1 /mnt/mds1
CMD: client-14vm3 mkdir -p /mnt/mds1; mount -t lustre -o user_xattr,acl /dev/lvm-MDS/P1 /mnt/mds1
CMD: client-14vm3 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests//usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/../utils:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/openmpi/1.4-gcc/bin:/usr/kerberos/sbin:/usr/kerberos/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin::/sbin NAME=autotest_config sh rpc.sh set_default_debug \"0x33f0404\" \" 0xffb7e3ff\" 32
CMD: client-14vm3 e2label /dev/lvm-MDS/P1 2>/dev/null
Started lustre-MDT0000
mmp test_8: @@@@@@ FAIL: mount /dev/lvm-MDS/P1 on mds1 should fail
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:3614:error_noexit()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mmp.sh:538:test_8()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:3869:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:3898:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:3772:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mmp.sh:560:main()
Dumping lctl log to /logdir/test_logs/2012-08-03/lustre-reviews-el6-x86_64-el5-x86_64_8086_-7f9bbfda2b88/mmp.test_8.*.1344048631.log
CMD: client-14vm1,client-14vm2.lab.whamcloud.com,client-14vm3,client-14vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /logdir/test_logs/2012-08-03/lustre-reviews-el6-x86_64-el5-x86_64_8086_-7f9bbfda2b88/mmp.test_8.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1344048631.log;
dmesg > /logdir/test_logs/2012-08-03/lustre-reviews-el6-x86_64-el5-x86_64_8086_-7f9bbfda2b88/mmp.test_8.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1344048631.log
CMD: client-14vm3 e2fsck -fy /dev/lvm-MDS/P1
client-14vm3: e2fsck 1.42.3.wc1 (28-May-2012)
client-14vm3: e2fsck: Cannot continue, aborting.
client-14vm3:
client-14vm3:
/dev/lvm-MDS/P1 is in use.
CMD: client-14vm3 grep -c /mnt/mds1' ' /proc/mounts
Stopping /mnt/mds1 (opts on client-14vm3
CMD: client-14vm3 umount -d /mnt/mds1
CMD: client-14vm3 lsmod | grep lnet > /dev/null && lctl dl | grep ' ST '
mmp test_8: @@@@@@ FAIL: test_8 failed with 1
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:3614:error_noexit()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:3636:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:3869:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:3898:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:3772:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mmp.sh:560:main()
Dumping lctl log to /logdir/test_logs/2012-08-03/lustre-reviews-el6-x86_64-el5-x86_64_8086_-7f9bbfda2b88/mmp.test_8.*.1344048645.log
CMD: client-14vm1,client-14vm2.lab.whamcloud.com,client-14vm3,client-14vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /logdir/test_logs/2012-08-03/lustre-reviews-el6-x86_64-el5-x86_64_8086_-7f9bbfda2b88/mmp.test_8.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1344048645.log;
dmesg > /logdir/test_logs/2012-08-03/lustre-reviews-el6-x86_64-el5-x86_64_8086_-7f9bbfda2b88/mmp.test_8.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1344048645.log
item.summary: mmp test_8: @@@@@@ FAIL: mount /dev/lvm-MDS/P1 on mds1 should fail

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are closed can be reopened.

comments.comment: also dup of LU-1689
Duplicate of LU-1435.
